main.description: Get the operation log for a member's permissioned repo within a space. Used for incremental sync. If a syncer falls behind compaction, oplog replay will produce a hash mismatch against the current commitment; the syncer then falls back to full-state recovery via listRecords + getRecord. Callable with either OAuth (for the authenticated user's own data) or a space-credential (for syncing services).

repo.description: The DID of the member whose oplog to retrieve.

limit.description: Maximum number of operations to return.

commit.description: Signed commitment over the current repo state. Includes the LtHash digest (commit.hash) and the rev. Only returned when the response drains the oplog to head — backfill responses omit it.

opEntry.description: A single operation in a permissioned repo's oplog. cid is null for deletes; prev is null for creates. Operations sharing the same rev belong to the same batch.
